content_fingerprint: openai spotlights 26 student innovators in first chatgpt futures class of 2026 openai has named the inaugural chatgpt futures class of 2026 highlighting 26 students who are using the company s ai tools to build projects conduct research and produce tangible real world outcomes openai announced the first cohort of its chatgpt futures programme on 6 may 2026 naming 26 students as the class of 2026 the announcement frames these innovators as using chatgpt to build products conduct research and drive measurable real world impact across areas the company describes as learning creativity and economi
